name: UBA : MaaS360 malicious email received
notes: Detect Email(MaaS360 secure mail) phishing attempt
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM MaaS360 Security
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when any of Event ID match MALICIOUS_EMAIL
when any of Event Category match THREAT
TD_list: APPLY UBA : MaaS360 malicious email received on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM MaaS360 Security
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when any of Event ID match MALICIOUS_EMAIL
AND when any of Event Category match THREAT
RED_list: Event name: UBA : MaaS360 malicious email received
Event description: senseValue=5,senseDesc='Email with malicious URL received'
